```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| output: false
ENV["GR_DISPLAY"] = "off"
ENV["QT_QPA_PLATFORM"] = "offscreen"

using Pkg
Pkg.activate(".")
using Revise
using Plots
gr(show=false)
default(
    size=(500, 400),
    leg=true,
    linewidth=2,
    xlegendfont=font(14),
    xtickfont=font(14),
    ytickfont=font(14),
    guidefont=font(14),
    legendfont=font(14),
    titlefont=font(18),
    # top_margin=5mm,
    # bottom_margin=5mm,
    # left_margin=5mm,
    # right_margin=5mm,
    fmt="svg", # https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/issues/6806
)
```
